# TMDB

Metadata provider backed by [The Movie Database](https://www.themoviedb.org). This is
the primary metadata source: it resolves a requested title into a concrete media item
with artwork, air dates, and the full season/episode structure that scraping and the
VFS layout depend on.

Practically every workflow passes through here, so TMDB should be configured before
anything else. An API key is free from your
[TMDB account settings](https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api).

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.media-item.index.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TMDB__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TMDB__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
